product: Anthropic Claude Sonnet 4.5 now available as a Databricks-hosted model
tagline: Mosaic AI Model Serving now supports Anthropic Claude Sonnet 4.5 as a Databricks hosted model.
what_it_does: Mosaic AI Model Serving now supports Anthropic Claude Sonnet 4.5 as a Databricks hosted model. You can access this model using Foundation Model APIs pay per token. This article provides an overview of Foundation Model APIs on Databricks.
why_it_matters: Provisioned throughput: This mode is recommended for all production workloads, especially those that require high throughput, performance guarantees, fine tuned models, or have additional security requirements.
plain_summary: Mosaic AI Model Serving now supports Anthropic Claude Sonnet 4.5 as a Databricks hosted model. You can access this model using Foundation Model APIs pay per token.
key_takeaway: Mosaic AI Model Serving now supports Anthropic Claude Sonnet 4.5 as a Databricks hosted model.
